items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage — Needs Manual Review

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Decision</summary>

- **Candidate labels considered:**
  - `Mgmt` + `Storage Mover` — The package `Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover` clearly maps to the `Mgmt` category (color `#ffeb77`). However, no service label named "Storage Mover" or "StorageMover" exists in the repository.
  - `Mgmt` + `Storage` — The `Storage` label (color `#e99695`) has description "Storage Service (Queues, Blobs, Files)" — this refers to `Azure.Storage.*` client libraries, not `Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover`. Applying it would be incorrect.
- **Confidence blockers:** No valid service label exists for this package. The only plausible candidate (`Storage`) explicitly refers to a different service. No quality reference issues (with `customer-reported` + `issue-addressed`) were found confirming a StorageMover ↔ service-label mapping.
- **Outcome:** Applied `needs-triage` — could not confidently predict a service label without risking an incorrect assignment.
</details>

<details>
<summary>👥 Owner Routing</summary>

- **CODEOWNERS scan:** Owner lookup was not performed — label prediction did not reach confidence threshold.
</details>
